creator: david.nul@davenulle.org
text:
hello,

Since i have updated the kernel and  "world" on friday 23.11.07,
KDE stops on the following error:

«
/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libkhtml.so.6: Undefined symbol "__mb_sb_limit"
»

I tried to rebuild KDE, but Kdelibs has failed on the same error.


I was running KDE 3.5.8 on FreeBSD 6.3-PRERELEASE
